playbook.intent: Recurring custom engagement to named, fixed-scope, fixed-price productized service with landing page, sales script, delivery SOP, and at least one paying customer.
playbook.scope: Take a recurring custom engagement and convert it into a named, fixed-scope, fixed-price productized service with a public landing page, sales script, delivery SOP, and at least one paying customer. Exit artifact: one shipped productized service whose unit-economics, delivery time, and customer satisfaction are documented and repeatable by the next contractor on the bench.

success-criteria.criterion: Public landing page with pricing visible
Delivery SOP runnable by a contractor (not the founder)
At least 1 paying customer at the productized price
Unit economics measured: gross margin + delivery hours

stage.name: Pattern audit
stage.intent: Find the recurring engagement worth productizing.

tasks.task: List last 12 months of paid engagements
Pick top-1 pattern by frequency x margin

stage.decision-gate: Advance if one pattern recurs at least 3 times with stable margin.

stage.name: Scope + price
stage.intent: Lock fixed scope + fixed price with explicit cuts.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only if scope fits one page and price defensible to a stranger.

stage.name: Landing + funnel
stage.intent: Public surface: positioning, copy, intake form, social proof.

tasks.task: Add intake form with qualifying questions

stage.decision-gate: Advance when landing converts at least 1 qualified discovery in 14 days.

stage.name: Sales script + delivery SOP
stage.intent: Make the sale + delivery repeatable without founder presence.

tasks.task: Record one demo session for the SOP

stage.decision-gate: Advance once a contractor can read the SOP and produce a draft deliverable.

stage.name: Launch + measure
stage.intent: Sell, deliver, measure unit-economics on first paid run.

tasks.task: Pitch to 5 best-fit past clients first

stage.decision-gate: Required: 1 paid sale at productized price AND margin at or above baseline custom engagement.

extra.value: ['Full SaaS productization - this is a service, not software', Multi-product portfolio - single productized offer per playbook run]
[Three or more past clients who bought a similar engagement, 'A landing page surface (Webflow, Framer, MDX, etc.)']

['Productizing the pattern the founder enjoys, not the one with the best margin', Pricing at last-engagement hours - locks you into custom margins, Treating the landing page as the launch - the SOP is the launch]
['Could a contractor deliver this without my direct involvement?', 'Does the price card embarrass me? If yes, raise it.', 'Did I measure margin or only revenue on the first run?']

{human: faion get-content productize-a-service-offering --format md, agent: faion get-content productize-a-service-offering --format context, json: faion get-content productize-a-service-offering --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P5 micro-agency founder persona}]
